risk_title: Insecurity Hindering Project Implementation in Northern States
risk_summary: Project team reports that insecurity is a challenge in some northern States and may hinder Project implementation. State offices are attempting to mitigate through partnerships with state security advisers.
evidence_quote: The Project team reported that insecurity is a challenge in some northern States and may hinder Project implementation. Various State offices have contacted their state security advisers and are forging partnerships to support their activities on the field.

risk_title: Conflict Dynamics Requiring Localized Management Structures
risk_summary: Project implementation in conflict-affected areas requires establishment of community conflict committees for monitoring and localized conflict resolution. Committees have been trained in conflict management, early warning, and early response, indicating ongoing conflict tensions.
evidence_quote: Most implementing States have also established community conflict committees to monitor and offer localized solutions to their problems. These committees have been trained in conflict management, early warning, and early response by selected consultants from reputable institutions of higher learning.

risk_title: Grievance Redress System Not Yet Operationalized
risk_summary: Although Grievance Redress Officers are present in all State offices, the Grievance system is not yet operationalized, creating a gap in conflict/complaint resolution mechanisms critical for FCV contexts.
evidence_quote: Although Grievance redress officers are present in all State offices, the Grievance system is not yet operationalized.

risk_title: Participatory Conflict Monitoring System Not Yet Commenced
risk_summary: A planned participatory monitoring and learning assessment to identify various actors in conflict management and conflict triggers has not yet commenced, delaying understanding of conflict dynamics affecting implementation.
evidence_quote: A planned participatory monitoring and learning assessment will commence soon to identify the various actors in conflict management and various types of conflict triggers.
